news.paragraph: Recent headlines highlight a surge in demand for power equipment suppliers, particularly those serving AI data centers, with one deal creating a major utility provider for this sector. While airline fares are up, consumer spending on travel and credit card trends remain a focus. The broader market shows strength in AI-related stocks, with several IBD 50 names nearing buy points. The news suggests a strong tailwind for companies involved in AI infrastructure and energy supply.

headlines.title: Quanta Services, IBD Stock Of The Day, Forges New Buy Point In AI Pullback
Airline Fares Are Up, But Americans Still Plan To Fly
Deal Creates One Of World's Largest Utilities, Major Power Provider For AI Data Centers
Broadcom Leads Five IBD 50 Stocks Near Buy Points; Most Are AI Plays
The Surprising Consumer Trend That Credit Cards Show
AI Data Center Power Equipment Supplier Surges As Growth Explodes
